plugins.name: content-engine
plugins.description: Unified LinkedIn content engine: one pipeline for ABM, TOFU, MOFU, and BOFU posts, pulling viral formats from selectable libraries (Virio corpus or Millie's curated list). Format library auto-refreshes from this repo each run — no plugin update needed. Supersedes abm-engine. Requires the Virio MCP connector.

plugins.name: copy-post
plugins.description: Style-matching engine: reverse-engineers an example LinkedIn post into a reusable style spec, then drafts a style-matched, funnel-classified, ICP-personalized, de-slopped post. Complements content-engine (library-driven) with example-driven drafting.

plugins.name: watt
plugins.description: Watt voice, brand, and signal-story toolkit: draft and de-slop copy in the founder voice (/deslop, /post), apply the Watt design system, and turn Watt audience data into branded signal-story reports. Merges the former watt-voice, watt-design, and watt-signal-story plugins.

plugins.name: gtm-strategy-suite
plugins.description: Builds a rigorous client-ready GTM strategy doc from a 16-section master template, delegating segmentation, pricing economics, sales-motion math, conjoint analysis, benchmarks, and claims-grounding to specialist skills with deterministic Python calculators.

plugins.name: dm-master
plugins.description: LinkedIn outreach ghostwriting: profile analysis, tone read, and register-matched connection notes, DMs, follow-ups, call asks, and rejection comebacks — written as the client, never inventing a profile detail.

plugins.name: lets-get-curious
plugins.description: Turns a topic you have to post about but don't care about into one you're curious enough to write well: 11 curiosity lenses, angle triage, then verified surprising facts. Hands off to watt or dm-master for drafting.

plugins.name: content-interview
plugins.description: Client content-intake pipeline: run the content interview, build a deep emotional ICP avatar, mine the transcript into 20+ tagged post concepts, and draft to hook-lever writing standards. Feeds content-engine downstream; no MCP dependencies.

plugins.name: linkedin-strategy
plugins.description: LinkedIn performance advisor grounded in research on 226K posts: performance states, image and timing strategy, reaction mechanics, topic selection, and 2026 feed mechanics — answers 'why is my engagement down' with findings, not vibes.

plugins.name: wartime-advisor
plugins.description: Strategic work and leadership advisor grounded in Horowitz's Peacetime/Wartime CEO framework and Grove's strategic inflection points, plus a skill × culture-fit talent 2x2. Direct, pushes back, diagnoses before advising.

plugins.name: systems-thinking
plugins.description: Systemic root-cause analysis via the Questions of a Systems Thinker and Causal Loop Diagrams. By Agile Pain Relief (CC BY-SA 4.0), packaged for this marketplace.

plugins.name: abm-engine
plugins.description: DEPRECATED — superseded by content-engine (which covers ABM plus the full funnel and auto-refreshes its library each run). ABM content engine: drafts LinkedIn posts from a curated library of 15 viral ABM formats, researches the client and market, proposes angles, and drafts posts. Requires the Virio MCP connector.
